ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device (e.g., smartphone, laptop, IoT device) */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line the device belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., in development, released, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with this parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Ambient Operating Temperature) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter (e.g., TA) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typical_value" REAL /* Typical value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement (e.g., °C, V) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the parameter is valid */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit (e.g., °C, V) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the parameter */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the parameter should be tested */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power metric entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with this power metric */,
  "current_type" TEXT /* Type of current (e.g., Active Power Supply Current, Idle Power Supply Current) */,
  "min_current" REAL /* Minimum current value */,
  "max_current" REAL /* Maximum current value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., mA, µA) */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the metric is valid */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the current */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the current should be tested */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the current */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition impacting device operations */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the condition should be tested */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance range for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device specifications */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the device specifications */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the specifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of specifications */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance standard entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with this standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance standard */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Version of the compliance standard */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the standard was approved */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_standards_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with this test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted */,
  "test_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the test */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* User who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device associated with the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
